station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== ROOT CAUSES OF YOUR PERFORMANCE ===

Time Management (Priority: HIGH)
You appear to have written under time pressure. Start assignments early to allow time for revision and improvement.

=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Efficient Learners - Low effort, acceptable results) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== SPECIFIC ACTIONS YOU SHOULD TAKE ===
1. RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
Time pressure is affecting your writing quality.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
help_seeking_examples: Salam miss, saha ftourek .I hope you are fine Sorry for the delay, I had a problem with my internet. I had some difficulty writing my second paragraph because I was not sure how to explain my idea clearly. In the sentence “a student might copy an essay from a tool and submit it” I tried to show how students may not learn if they use AI. I also tried to give an example to make my point stronger. Can you please tell me if this example is clear or should I explain it more?
recommendations: RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort
